title: Pipe Fitter
description:
Job Overview

We are seeking a skilled Pipefitter to join our team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for assembling, installing, maintaining, and repairing piping systems for various applications, including industrial & commercial projects.

Key Responsibilities

  • Read and interpret technical drawings and piping diagrams.
  • Measure, cut, thread, bend, and weld pipes according to project specifications.
  • Assemble and secure pipes using welding, soldering, brazing, and cementing techniques.
  • Install pipes, valves, and fittings onto walls, tanks, and other structures.
  • Inspect and test piping systems using pressure gauges and hydrostatic testing.
  • Diagnose and repair leaks, blockages, and damaged pipes.
  • Ensure compliance with safety standards, building codes, and company policies.
  • Operate specialized tools such as pipe cutters, threaders, and bending machines.
  • Work closely with project managers, engineers, and other team members.

Requirements

Education & Certification:

  • Minimum Higer Nitech or equivalent.
  • BCSS / CSOC certification required.
  • Certifications in Work at Height, Scissor Lift, and Manhole Safety preferred.

Skills & Experience:

  • 2-3 years of relevant experience in pipefitting or a related trade.
  • Ability to read and interpret technical drawings and specifications.
  • Strong mechanical skills and proficiency in using pipefitting tools.
  • Physical strength and stamina to handle heavy materials and work in demanding environments.
  • Problem-solving skills with the ability to diagnose and repair piping issues.
  • Good communication skills and a responsible, detail-oriented work attitude.

Key deliverables

  • Fulfil customers satisfaction
  • Lay out consistent quality and service
  • Ownership in cost-effectiveness and profitable
  • Without fail comply with legal and regulatory requirements
  • Take responsibility to continually make improvement
  • Execute (quality/enriching/inspiring/productive/contribute) innovation
  • Keeping delivery on-time

postedCompany.description:
Flowtek Engineering Pte Ltd is Singapore based organisation and in the field of provision of engineering services for semi-conductor, pharmaceutical and related industries, including maintenance, pipes and equipment / tools hook-up, servicing, repair and fabrication of process-flow piping.

Our Special strengths include skilled knowledge of process planning, layout and detailed Engineering Drafting inclusive of skid and piping space management. We are also highly experienced in planning, project execution and commissioning of large-scale plants and equipment. And highly proficient in the execution of DI & Waste Water Treatment Plant and Chemical Dispense System piping installation.

FLowtek Engineering Pte Ltd has been awarded the BCEA Top 10 Engineering Companies (2013 Building  Construction Excellence Award)
postedCompany.name: FLOWTEK ENGINEERING PTE. LTD.
